block_00: Kripya apne card ke svaamitva ki pushti karen
block_02: Apnee card ke svaamitva ki pushti karne ke lie, hamaare niyamon aur sharton ke anusaar, ham aapse apna card
block_04: neeche diye gaye link ke maadhyam se
block_05: Mahatvapurn: Suraksha ke liye, kripya card namber ko aage ki or (keval pahle 6 aur antim 4 ankon ko chhodakar) aur peeche maujud poora CVV code dhak den, keval apne hastaakshar chhod den.
block_07: Yadi aapke paas koi prashn hai to aap hame yehan sampark kar sakte hain
